title: remove XDG_RUNTIME_DIR from default authfile path
body:
Remove XDG_RUNTIME_DIR from default authfile path.
This patch will let authfile path default to the containers/image location for the authentication file. Which for now will be xdg_runtime_dir, but eventually will switch to kernel keyring.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang qiwan@redhat.com

comments.body:
@QiWang19 You should put more information into the PR docs.

Default to the containers/image location for authentication file.  Which for now will be xdg_runtime_dir, but eventually will switch to kernel keyring.
